publicDir.description: The served public dir (site root). Markdown is authored under <publicDir>/<root>.

root.description: Site root url, e.g. /guide. Sources live at <publicDir>/<root>.

siteUrl.description: Absolute site url. When set, emits sitemap.xml, robots.txt and the llms*.txt files.

sitemap.description: Emit sitemap.xml when siteUrl is set.

robots.description: Emit robots.txt when siteUrl is set.

llms.description: Emit llms.txt and llms-full.txt when siteUrl is set.
